weather.impact: No weather-related delays. Conditions favourable for steel erection and exterior work.

workers.notes: Completed eastern bay frame, ahead of schedule.

materials.name: M16 anchor bolts
materials.notes: Additional stock ordered for Wednesday AM delivery.

issues.title: Water ingress on southern wall
issues.description: Damp patch observed near taped tarp seam from last week's temporary roofing. Appears non-structural but requires a survey before the wall is closed up.
issues.action: Book damp survey within 48 hours; hold wall close-up until results received.

issues.title: Concrete pour delay (lift shaft)
issues.description: Ready-mix supplier missed the Tuesday slot.
issues.action: Pour now scheduled Thursday 08:00 — programme float absorbs the slip.

nextSteps: Book damp survey for southern wall (target: Wednesday).
Confirm anchor-bolt delivery window with supplier.
Prepare formwork for Thursday lift-shaft pour.
Hand over eastern bay sign-off pack to QS by end of week.

summarySections.title: Programme
summarySections.body: Steel erection on the eastern bay completed a day ahead of plan. Concrete pour for the lift shaft slipped to Thursday but does not impact critical path; programme float of two days remains on this work package.

summarySections.title: Quality
summarySections.body: Bolt torque verified to spec on all installed anchors. Damp survey required before closing the southern wall — this is the only open quality item.

summarySections.title: Safety
summarySections.body: No reportable incidents. Working-at-height permits in place for the erection crew; toolbox talk on edge protection delivered at 07:30.
